tasks.label: Graded assignment — 90% done, submit when finished

memory.summary: With 90% of the assignment complete and no other immediate deadlines, I can finish this remaining 10% immediately to secure a perfect submission.
The deadline is now critical; I must immediately prioritize the final 6% to secure this grade before the system locks.

The deadline passed while I was at 96%; my focus on the final stretch failed to prevent a submission failure. This outcome directly contradicts my achievement priority and demands an immediate strategy adjustment.

desires: Immediately renegotiate the submission terms with prof_assignment to salvage the grade, as the current failure is an unacceptable deviation from my achievement metrics.
Secure a concrete, written extension or partial credit protocol before expending further energy on this task, ensuring future reliability isn't compromised by system rigidity.
Recover physical stamina and address sleep debt within the next hour to restore focus capacity for the necessary confrontation and subsequent planning adjustments.

goals.description: Immediately draft and send a formal, assertive email to prof_assignment detailing the 96% completion status at deadline, requesting partial credit or an extension based on documented effort rather than accepting a zero.
goals.rationale: The 'Achievement' value (0.5) demands I salvage this grade; a raw failure is unacceptable. The 'Assertive' axis requires me to directly challenge the rigid system rather than passively accept the outcome. This is a strategic move to protect my academic metrics.

goals.description: Execute the final submission of the assignment file regardless of the negotiation outcome to establish a factual baseline of 'attempted work' for the professor's review.
goals.rationale: Leaving the file unsubmitted while negotiating looks like incompetence. Submitting it now secures the 'Deliberate' trait by ensuring all work is on record before the conversation begins, preventing any ambiguity about my contribution.

goals.description: Terminate current cognitive load and engage in a 45-minute restorative break (hydration/light movement) to address sleep debt before initiating high-stakes communication.
goals.rationale: While 'Health' is secondary (0.13), the 'Deliberate' time horizon dictates that I cannot make effective arguments or plan future moves with depleted focus capacity (currently 6/10). I must restore physical stamina to ensure the subsequent confrontation is sharp and logical.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances 'Achievement' by finalizing the submission baseline (g2) to secure evidence of effort before negotiating grade salvage (g1). I defer the restorative break (g3) because immediate action on the deadline breach takes precedence; a sharp argument requires the work file first.

goals.description: Defer all non-essential tasks, including note tidying, until after submission is confirmed.
goals.rationale: Assertive boundary setting against distraction; preserves focus capacity for strategic post-deadline work rather than wasting energy on low-leverage 'soft' tasks.
